title: MikroTik CSS610-1Gi-7R-2S+OUT - netPower Lite 7R reverse PoE switch
description: MikroTik netPower Lite 7R is a reverse PoE switch with 8x Gigabit ethernet ports, two SFP ports, DC power connector, DC terminal and SwOS operating system. The first 7 LAN ports allow power through PoE IN and 8th port supports PoE out to power other devices, such as CPE antenna, camera or switch. The advantage of reverse PoE is independence from one power supply . You can power switch with up to 7 power adapters via PoE IN at the same time, but only one power will be active at a time.
